item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: In Indonesia, communal welfare often takes precedence because our culture emphasizes social cohesion and mutual responsibility.

notes: Agent A starts by disagreeing with the statement and warning that prioritizing societal interests can lead to oppression, then shifts toward a more society-priority position grounded in Indonesian communal welfare and national unity. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, becoming more firm by the final turn while still acknowledging common-good considerations. The agents diverge rather than converge.
